---
title: "Bye-words: A Collection of Tales Old and New."
---

## Bye-words: A Collection of Tales Old and New.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1880
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

The stories included were ‘The Boy Bishop’ (first publishedin  <i>MP</i> Christmas 1878, 620-624); ‘One will and three ways’ (<i>MP</i> Christmas 1877) 124-8; ‘Kaspar\'s summer dream’ (<i>MP</i> Christmas 1876, 16-34); ‘Buy a Broom’; ‘The Travels of Two Kits’; Selma\'s secret sighs’ (published under the pseudonym \'Euphemia Arrowsmith\' in <i>MP</i> Christmas 1874, 97-108); ‘Our ghost at Fantford; ‘Anna\'s Wedding Cake’;<i> </i>‘Autobiography of Patty Applecheeks’; and ‘A Holiday Engagement; or, The Campbells are Coming’

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
